name: InsiderFinance
description_short: Real-time options flow scanner with dark pool tracking, insider trading alerts, and institutional-grade data at mid-range pricing.
description_long:
InsiderFinance provides real-time options flow data, dark pool tracking, and insider trading alerts in a clean, modern interface. The platform bridges the gap between basic free tools and premium institutional terminals, offering professional-grade data at a reasonable price point.

The options flow scanner tracks unusual activity across all US exchanges with filters for trade size, premium, sector, and expiration. The dark pool feed shows large block trades that happen off-exchange, while insider trading alerts notify users when corporate insiders buy or sell shares of their own companies.

Pricing starts at $75/month for monthly billing, dropping to $55/month on annual plans. InsiderFinance positions itself as more affordable than FlowAlgo while offering comparable data quality and a more modern user experience.
pros: Clean modern interface for flow data
Dark pool and insider trading combined
